verse.name: V1
verse.lines: The Father has a plan. Though it's hard to see it now You feel you're walking all alone. But He is there no doubt When the storm around you rages, And you're tossed to and fro When you're faced with life's decisions, Not sure which way to go

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Stand still and let God move, Standing still is hard to do When you feel You have reached the end, He'll make a way for you Stand still and let God move

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: When the enemy surrounds you, And the walls are closing in When the tide is swiftly rising, And you wonder where He's been Friend, there never was a moment, That His arms weren't reaching out You can rest assured and be secure, God is moving right now

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: The answer will come but only in His time Stand still and let God move.
